description_long: This is a rectangular marble relief sculpture featuring three prominent human figures in classical attire. The central figure is seated, holding a staff, while another adult figure stands behind, and a third, smaller figure appears to be a child or youth. The figures are rendered in high relief, emerging from a flat stone slab, with detailed drapery and expressive faces. The back and sides of the slab are flat and undecorated, emphasizing the frontal display of the sculpted scene. The marble surface is smooth with subtle variations in tone, typical of classical or neoclassical stonework.
description: A detailed marble relief sculpture depicting three human figures in classical dress, emerging from a flat stone slab. The front is intricately carved, while the back and sides are plain.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the depth of the relief and the arrangement of the figures, with the sculpted scene partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the flat, undecorated back of the stone slab.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the thickness of the slab and the plain, uncarved surface.
description_view_3: Frontal view clearly showing the three human figures and the detailed relief work.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures in classical attire in high relief
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
